title: taraxacum pseudohabile
intro: Taraxacum pseudohabile, commonly known as the lesser dandelion or wild endive, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Taraxacum pseudohabile include its potential to improve digestion, boost the immune system, and even lower blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
